channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: New eCash fork aims to bolt drivechains onto Bitcoin in August, with a 1:1 BTC↔eCash swap and a controversial reallocation of Satoshi’s coins. 🪙 #Bitcoin #Blockchain #Crypto-news https://Blockchain.News/news/paul-sztorc-ecash-bitcoin-hard-fork
item.description: New eCash fork aims to bolt drivechains onto Bitcoin in August, with a 1:1 BTC↔eCash swap and a controversial reallocation of Satoshi’s coins. 🪙 #Bitcoin #Blockchain #Crypto-news https://Blockchain.News/news/paul-sztorc-ecash-bitcoin-hard-fork

item.title: US bans crypto tied to Iran’s IRGC and Hizballah: $344M frozen, USDT blocked. Sanctions tighten Tehran’s digital-finance web. 🔒💥 https://Blockchain.News/news/us-freezes-crypto-iran-irgc-hizballah #crypto #sanctions #IRGC
